scripts.dev:all: bunx concurrently -c "#93c5fd,#c4b5fd,#fcd34d,#86efac" "php artisan octane:start --server=frankenphp --caddyfile=Caddyfile --host=${APP_BIND_HOST:-127.0.0.1} --port=${APP_PORT:-8000} --admin-port=${CADDY_SERVER_ADMIN_PORT:-2019}" "php artisan queue:work --queue=ai-chat-turns,ai-agent-tasks,ai-background-commands,ai-schedules,default --tries=1 --timeout=900 --sleep=1" "php artisan schedule:work" "bun run dev" --names=server,queue,scheduler,vite
scripts.dev:all:watch: bunx concurrently -c "#93c5fd,#c4b5fd,#fcd34d,#86efac" "php artisan octane:start --server=frankenphp --caddyfile=Caddyfile --host=${APP_BIND_HOST:-127.0.0.1} --port=${APP_PORT:-8000} --admin-port=${CADDY_SERVER_ADMIN_PORT:-2019} --watch" "php artisan queue:work --queue=ai-chat-turns,ai-agent-tasks,ai-background-commands,ai-schedules,default --tries=1 --timeout=900 --sleep=1" "php artisan schedule:work" "bun run dev" --names=server,queue,scheduler,vite
